src/main/java/com/epam/training/gen/ai/G.general_idea: Remove the explicit @PropertySource annotation to rely on Spring Boot's default configuration loading mechanism.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent and dependency management to version 3.3.6, which requires Java 17+ but is often updated alongside major JDK migrations for feature parity.
Introduce explicit dependency management for Spring Boot dependencies to ensure version consistency.
Introduce explicit dependency management for Semantic Kernel dependencies using a BOM.
Remove hardcoded versions from Semantic Kernel dependencies to rely on the newly added BOM for version management.
Remove hardcoded versions from Semantic Kernel API dependency to rely on the BOM.
Upgrade the Semantic Kernel experimental library from 1.2.2 to 1.4.0.
Remove the explicit semantickernel-bom dependency from the dependencies section since it is now handled in dependencyManagement.
